channel.title: Beacon Hill Events
channel.description: Upcoming events for Beacon Hill Events

item.title: Raised By TV Events Presents: *ALL AGES* Bob's Burgers Trivia Night
item.description:
Sunday, April 12, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Clock-Out Lounge\, 4864 Beacon Ave S\, Seattle\, 98108\, United States Of America

RAISED By TV brings you:BOBS BURGERS Trivia Night!50 BRAND NEW questions about your favorite Burger making family- covering seasons 1-9 Sun April 12th$7 ONLINE ADVANCE: {plus ticketing fees}$9 Day of & AT THE DOOR {plus ticketing fees}Doors open at 5:00. Trivia starts at 6:00!all ages til 8pm!Tables are first come first serve. **PRIZES**The RAISED BY TV gang has put together some killer prize packages. Teams of 1-5 are welcome. Prizes for 1st\, 2nd\, t have to be good at trivia just come on down to relive some Belcher family shenanigans with us. **FOOD & DRINKS**The Clock-Out has bar and full Stevies famous Pizza food service; one of the things that makes it our favorite place.The show is available on Hulu and Disney +We hope you can join RbyTV for a safe night of fun and brains.Brandon Ryan

From Clock-Out Lounge

Event details

item.title: 健安樂齡科技坊
item.description:
Monday, April 13, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Beacon Hill Branch

來參加我們 的樂齡科技交流會，與我們 一起探索數位世界！活動以粵語和國語進行。

From SPL - Beacon Hill Branch

Event details

item.title: Clock-Out Lounge Presents: Collide-O-Scope
item.description:
Monday, April 13, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Clock-Out Lounge\, 4864 Beacon Ave S\, Seattle\, 98108\, United States Of America

Clock-Out Lounge Presents: Collide-O-ScopeEvery 2nd Monday!Doors 7pm21+ $15https://www.collideoscopeseattle.com/For 16 years\, Collide-O-Scope has been slaying Seattle audiences with its singular brand of entertainment keenly curated vintage video\, freaky film\, found-footage fun\, all masterfully woven into hilariously mind-melting montages. An expertly crafted fantasia of sight and sound\, packed with absurd pop culture ephemera\, obscure oddities\, and awesome music\, all remixed and mashed into epic entertainment that only the editing wizards of Collide-O-Scope could provide. Perfect for stoners\, drinkers\, thinkers\, and all seekers of the unusual. This hosted event also features fabulous free prize drawings throughout the night!For a decade\, Collide-O-Scope had its home at Seattles beloved Re-bar\, until 2020\, when they took the show online while the world worked some stuff out. Re-emerging in 2022\, they made The Here-After (at The Crocodile) their home for the next four years. Now\, celebrating their 16th anniversary\, Collide-O-Scope has landed right here at Clock-Out Lounge\, and YOU can see them HERE every 2nd Monday! Collide-O-Scope is the greatest show anywhere! Dina MartinaHalf video art installation and half stoner gawkfest David Schmader

From Clock-Out Lounge

Event details

item.title: Trivia at Oak
item.description:
Monday, April 13, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: 3019 Beacon Ave S, Seattle, WA 98144

Weekly pub trivia hosted by Head in the Clouds Trivia

item.title: Kaleidoscope Play & Learn / 万花筒游戏和学习@笔架山分店 / 萬花筒遊戲和學習@筆架山分店
item.description:
Tuesday, April 14, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Beacon Hill Branch, Meeting Room

Children listen to multilingual stories, sing songs and do simple arts and crafts with their caregivers during the group time. There is also a play time for children to explore various toys and play activities.Event is in English and Mandarin.-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------萬花筒邊玩邊學®: 孩子與他們的照顧者在小組中一起聽多種語言故事、唱歌並做簡單的手工。萬花筒邊玩邊學®也是一個提供孩子們探索各種玩具和遊戲活動的時間。本活動將以國語和英語進行。-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------万花筒边玩边学®: 孩子与他们的照顾者在小组中一起听多种语言故事、唱歌并做简单的手工。万花筒边玩边学®也是一个提供給孩子们探索各种玩具和游戏活动的时间。本次活动将以普通话和英语进行。

From SPL - Beacon Hill Branch

Event details

item.title: Mortgage Lifters @ Perihelion Brewery
item.description:
Tuesday, April 14, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Perihelion Brewery, 2800 16th Ave S, Seattle

Seattle and Vashon Island based band playing original and classic swing pop songs. Kim Thal, Robert Hinrix, Johnny Calcagno, and Tony Mates. Also known in some circles as Radiator Charlie's Mortgage Lifters. Tunes of the Golden Era.

From Perihelion Brewery

Event details

item.title: Office Hours with Department of Neighborhoods
item.description:
Wednesday, April 15, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Beacon Hill Branch

The City of Seattle’s Department of Neighborhoods (DON) will be holding office hours as part of their "Meeting Community Where They Are At" Initiative.

From SPL - Beacon Hill Branch

Event details

item.title: Transformative Life Skills: Rewriting the Money Story
item.description:
Wednesday, April 15, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Beacon Hill Branch, Meeting Room

Unpack how upbringing, identity, and culture shape money beliefs and choices, then rewrite the story to fit your goals.

From SPL - Beacon Hill Branch

Event details

item.title: Denkyem Drop In and CoLab
item.description:
Thursday, April 16, 2026 at 12:30 PM

Location: Beacon Hill Branch, Lobby

Join Denkyem staff and a business librarian to update your business plan with industry insights, access market research, or bounce ideas off the like-minded entrepreneurs. Let's CoLab!

From SPL - Beacon Hill Branch

Event details

Friday, April 17, 2026 at 9 PM

item.title: English Conversation Circle
item.description:
Saturday, April 18, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Beacon Hill Branch, Meeting Room

Practice your English Conversation skills with other adult learners.Practique su inglés.Luyện tập tiếng Anh của quý vị.练习英语。練習英語。英会話の練習をしましょう。Ku Celceli Ingiriisigaaga.እንግሊዘኛዎንይለማመዱ።እንግሊዘኛኹምተለማመዱ።Afaan Ingilizii kee shaakali.Практикуйте вашу англійську.Практикуйтесь в английском языке.Pratiquez votre anglais.Practique seu inglês.

From SPL - Beacon Hill Branch

Event details

item.title: La Hora de Cuentos Familiares
item.description:
Saturday, April 18, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Beacon Hill Branch, Área para niños

Durante la hora de cuentos, los niños de 0 a 5 años y sus familias pueden disfrutar de historias, canciones y divertidas actividades de aprendizaje.Evento en español.

From SPL - Beacon Hill Branch

Event details

item.title: Clock-Out Lounge Presents: The Messthetics and James Brandon Lewis w/ Ruminants
item.description:
Saturday, April 18, 2026 at 9 PM

Location: Clock-Out Lounge\, 4864 Beacon Ave S\, Seattle\, 98108\, United States Of America

Clock-Out Lounge Presents: The Messthetics and James Brandon LewisDeface the Currency Tourwith special guest RuminantsSat April 18thDoors 8:3021+$22adv/$25doshttps://themessthetics.bandcamp.com/album/the-messthetics-and-james-brandon-lewisDeface the Currency\, the new second collaborative album from the Messthetics andJames Brandon Lewis\, grew out of a simple intuition. The group with saxophonistLewis joining the core Messthetics lineup of Brendan Canty on drums\, Joe Lally on bass and Anthony Pirog on guitar was on tour in the summer of 2025 when Canty knew it was time to go back into the studio. This configuration of the band had debuted on record the year prior\, releasing an acclaimed self-titled album via Impulse!\, the legendary jazz label. But as the quartet logged serious time on the road\, the drummer felt their chemistry evolving\, so he called up engineer Don Godwin and booked a couple of days at Tonal Park in Takoma Park\, Maryland\, where The Messthetics and James Brandon Lewis was recorded.Deface the Currency preserves the tightness and variety of its predecessor\, but across the albums seven tracks\, it reveals new levels of confidence and risk. On pieces such as the title track named after a quote from Greek philosopher Diogenes that speaks to challenging societal norms and a new version of Serpent Tongue\, which first appeared on the Messthetics self-titled 2018 debut\, the quartet reaches ecstatic peaks that convey fun as much as ferocity. More than any earlier statement by the band\, the record seamlessly melds the sounds that make up its collective DNA\, from punk rock to free jazz and funk\, balancing compositional precision with palpable improvisational fire.Ruminants is a trio based in Portland\, OR and Tacoma\, WA featuring Marisa Anderson (Thrill Jockey recording artist\, frequent collaborator with Jim White\, Tara Jane\, ONeil\, William Tyler) on guitar\, Sam Coomes (Quasi\, Elliott Smith\, Jon Spencer\, Jandek\, Built To Spill s first official Dead Moon night\, the three wondered what would happen if they tried improvising together. A practice tape was made and then shelved for the next 7 years. In fall of 2025\, they decided to revisit the project and were delighted to discover theyd made some interesting noise together. Experimenting loosely with composition\, structure and improvisation\, the distinct styles of each player can be heard interplaying with a diverse range of themes.

From Clock-Out Lounge

Event details

item.title: The Messthetics and James Brandon Lewis w/ Ruminants

Sun April 19th 6pm$7 ONLINE ADVANCE: {plus ticketing fees}$9 AT THE DOOR {plus ticketing fees}Doors open at 5:00. Trivia starts at 6:00!Tables are first come first serve.Clock-Out is a 21 and over bar after 8pm **PRIZES**The RAISED BY TV gang has put together some killer prize packages. Teams of 1-5 are welcome. Prizes for 1st\, 2nd\, t have to be good at trivia just come on down to relive some Hogwarts shenanigans with us. **FOOD & DRINKS**The Clock-Out has bar and Stevies Famous Pizza food service; one of the things that makes it our favorite place.The show is available on HBO MAXWe hope you can join RbyTV for a safe night of fun and brains.Brandon Ryan

From Clock-Out Lounge

Event details

item.title: Tyler McGinnis @ Perihelion Brewery
item.description:
Tuesday, April 21, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Perihelion Brewery, 2800 16th Ave South, Seattle, WA 98144

Born and raised in Los Angeles, CA It was not until after graduating high school and moving to Fremont, NE, to attend Midland University on scholarship for football that Tyler began to pursue his passion for music with vigor. After graduating, he relocated to Seattle, WA in the summer of 2017, where he currently resides and has been making impressive leaps and bounds in his songwriting, performing, and overall musical identity during his time in the PNW. His creative spin on past and present experiences breeds songs that lyrically offer a sensationalized window into his life. Tyler boasts powerful vocal performances that mix rich styles of Americana and Alternative Country music with Southern Rock and a fresh twist of soulful melodies. His music will have you singing along to a good time drinking song, reminiscing about long lost love and the regretful or questionable choices of your past, then leave you feeling uplifted, refreshed, and in an all around good mood.

From Perihelion Brewery

Event details

item.description:

item.title: Tractor Presents: Rose City Band w/ Serafima and The Shakedowns
item.description:
Thursday, May 7, 2026 at 9 PM

Location: Clock-Out Lounge\, 4864 Beacon Ave S\, Seattle\, 98108\, United States Of America

Tractor Presents: Rose City Band w/ Serafima and The ShakedownsThurs May 7thDoors 8:3021+$22adv/$30dos*please note for which night you are purchasing tickets- no refunds https://rosecityband.bandcamp.com/album/sol-y-sombraRose City Bands music is sun-kissed timeless country rock whose seemingly effortless momentum carries the joy of its creation without ignoring the darkness pervading our consciousness. Led by guitarist/vocalist Ripley Johnson\, the music of Rose City Band is rooted in his love of private press records of the mid to late 70s. The band\, in addition to Johnson\, features pedal steel guitarist Barry Walker\, keyboardist Paul Hasenberg and drummer John Jeffrey who enmesh a keen sense of rhythmic drive and melody with gentler\, sumptuous atmospheres. https://serafimaandtheshakedowns.bandcamp.com/musicHunky tonk from Seattle\, WA

From Clock-Out Lounge

Event details

Led by guitarist/vocalist Ripley Johnson\, the music of Rose City Band is rooted in his love of private press records of the mid to late 70s. The band\, in addition to Johnson\, features pedal steel guitarist Barry Walker\, keyboardist Paul Hasenberg and drummer John Jeffrey who enmesh a keen sense of rhythmic drive and melody with gentler\, sumptuous atmospheres. https://serafimaandtheshakedowns.bandcamp.com/musicHunky tonk from Seattle\, WA

Led by guitarist/vocalist Ripley Johnson\, the music of Rose City Band is rooted in his love of private press records of the mid to late 70s. The band\, in addition to Johnson\, features pedal steel guitarist Barry Walker\, keyboardist Paul Hasenberg and drummer John Jeffrey who enmesh a keen sense of rhythmic drive and melody with gentler\, sumptuous atmospheres. https://serafimaandtheshakedowns.bandcamp.com/musicHunky tonk from Seattle\, WA

item.title: Clock-Out Lounge Presents: The Darts- U.S. (Album Release) w/ Service plus Dish Pit
item.description:
Saturday, May 9, 2026 at 9 PM

Location: Clock-Out Lounge\, 4864 Beacon Ave S\, Seattle\, 98108\, United States Of America

Clock-Out Lounge Presents: The Darts- U.S. (Album Release) Service plus Dish Pit Saturday May 9th8:30 PM 21+ $17 adv/ $20 dos https://thedartsus.bandcamp.com/track/apocalypse-singleGarage-punk-rock grrls will make your head slam and your feet shake. And then theres the music.https://gimmesomeservice.bandcamp.com/album/drag-me-3S-E-R-V-I-C-E is a rock and roll band for fans of The Fall\, The Stooges\, Ike and Tina\, bad taste\, Bukowski\, ranch water\, and standing in line reading tabloids at the supermarket. Writing the second record. S-E-R-V-I-C-E is Russell Simins\, Jilly Weiss\, Brandon Beaver\, Erica Strout\, and Tony Ash. https://dishpit666.bandcamp.com/album/doing-dishes-to-make-music-to-do-dishes-toSopping industry thrash and trash.

From Clock-Out Lounge

Event details

item.title: Clock-Out Lounge Presents: Collide-O-Scope
item.description:
Monday, May 11, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Clock-Out Lounge\, 4864 Beacon Ave S\, Seattle\, 98108\, United States Of America

Clock-Out Lounge Presents: Collide-O-ScopeEvery 2nd Monday!Doors 7pm21+ $15https://www.collideoscopeseattle.com/For 16 years\, Collide-O-Scope has been slaying Seattle audiences with its singular brand of entertainment keenly curated vintage vid features fabulous free prize drawings throughout the night!For a decade\, Collide-O-Scope had its home at Seattles beloved Re-bar\, until 2020\, when they took the show online while the world worked some stuff out. Re-emerging in 2022\, they made The Here-After (at The Crocodile) their home for the next four years. Now\, celebrating their 16th anniversary\, Collide-O-Scope has landed right here at Clock-Out Lounge\, and YOU can see them HERE every 2nd Monday! Collide-O-Scope is the greatest show anywhere! Dina MartinaHalf video art installation and half stoner gawkfest David Schmader

From Clock-Out Lounge

item.title: Raised By TV Events Presents: Seinfeld Trivia Night
item.description:
Tuesday, May 12, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Clock-Out Lounge\, 4864 Beacon Ave S\, Seattle\, 98108\, United States Of America

RAISED By TV brings you:SEINFELD Trivia Night!50 BRAND NEW questions about your favorite NY misfits- covering all 9 Seasons Tues May 12th$7 ONLINE ADVANCE: {plus ticketing fees}$9 Day of and AT THE DOOR {plus ticketing fees}Doors open at 5:30. Trivia starts at 7pmTables are first come first serve. THE CLOCK-OUT LOUNGEIs a 21 and over venue after 8pm **PRIZES**The RAISED BY TV gang have put together some killer prize packages. Teams of 1-5 are welcome. Prizes for 1st\, 2nd\, t have to be good at trivia just come on down to relive some Jerry apt shenanigans with us. **FOOD & DRINKS**The Clock-Out has bar and full Stevies Famous Pizza food service; one of the things that makes it our favorite place.The show is available on NetflixWe hope you can join RbyTV for a safe night of fun and brains.Brandon Ryan

From Clock-Out Lounge

Event details

item.title: Swinson & The Expedition @ Perihelion Brewery
item.description:
Tuesday, May 12, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Perihelion Brewery, 2800 16th Ave South, Seattle, WA 98144

Drawing on their love of Pacific Northwest History and blending their disparate indie rock influences (Eric worships Howe Gelb and Janet Weiss, while Sam adores Lonely Forest and Keith Moon), Swinson and the Expedition is historic concept rock that has the looseness of a 1960s country house band, an element of basement psychedelia, and the intensity and rage of the Vikings from which Eric traces his ancestry.

From Perihelion Brewery

Event details

item.title: Emmett Montgomery and Brett Hamil Present: Joketellers Union w/ Jenna Nobs
item.description:
Wednesday, May 13, 2026 at 8:30 PM

Location: Clock-Out Lounge\, 4864 Beacon Ave S\, Seattle\, 98108\, United States Of America

Emmett Montgomery and Brett Hamil Present: Joketellers Unionw/ guest Jenna NobsDoors 8pm21+$12adv/$15dosA monthly comedy show produced by Emmett Montgomery and Brett Hamil featuring the best local and nationally touring comedians\, special guests with special talents\, friendship\, pizza and rhythmic clapping.

From Clock-Out Lounge

item.title: Clock-Out Lounge Presents: TUSH!
item.description:
Thursday, May 14, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Clock-Out Lounge\, 4864 Beacon Ave S\, Seattle\, 98108\, United States Of America

Clock-Out Lounge Presents: TUSH!Thurs May 14thDoors 7pm-show at 8pm21+$20adv/$25dos Cant stop\, wont stop! TUSH keeps coming in hot with the lineups this year! Seattles BEST drag show is stepping into May with resident\, Queen Andrew Scott and special guest\, Sara Femme! Amora Namor\, Angel Baby Kill Kill Kill\, and Pussy Willow will also be taking the stage while Betty Wetter keeps you chuckling all night long. Get there early for a slice of Stevies Famous Pizza and get in the mood with DJ dark wiley!

From Clock-Out Lounge

Event details

item.title: Clock-Out Lounge Presents: Dazzling Killmen w/ Point Line Plane\, Quid Quo
item.description:
Friday, May 15, 2026 at 9 PM

Location: Clock-Out Lounge\, 4864 Beacon Ave S\, Seattle\, 98108\, United States Of America

Clock-Out Lounge Presents:Dazzling Killmen Point Line PlaneQuid Quo Fri May 15th8:30 doors 21+ $22adv/$25dos https://dazzlingkillmen.bandcamp.com/musicIn 1994\, Dazzling Killmen\, a quartet from the St. Louis area named after a line inanobscure\, grotesque 1963 short story by Lucas Samaras\, put out a record called Face of Collapse\,their second and final full-length. By the following year\, they had broken up. Face of Collapseis a milestone for underground extreme rock in the 90s and should be experienced by fans of everything from Slint to the Dillinger Escape Plan to Rush .In fact\, there would be no Converge\, Today is the Day or Dillinger Escape plan without this essential blueprint. As former Rolling Stone senior editor Hank Shteamer wrote \,No other music that I know of candeliver what this [music] delivers\, either emotionallyits specific combination of creeping dread\, frantic anxiety and seething rageor sonically: The grand\, gothic power chords at the outset\, sounding like some horror-movie overture. The thresher-like riff that follows\, and then\, the onset of one of the greatest sequences of aggressive rock music Ive ever heard: a sort of hypnotic death waltz…broken up by racing\, scampering full-band interludes and giving way to a deranged\, writhing climaxwith the guitars stabbing at oblique angles over the rhythm sections lockstep convulsionsthat feels at once vise-tight and completely unhinged. When the whole band kicks into the next break neck triplet riff\, the effect is one of complete information overload. For the first time in 30 years\, youre going to be able to hear this music live.https://pointlineplane.bandcamp.com/album/smoke-signalsBetween 2002 and 2005 Portland synth/punk duo Point Line Plane played 150 shows across the US. Vocalist/keyboardist Joshua Blanchard (Major Hex) and drummer Nathan Carson (Witch Mountain) initially honed their near-telepathic live skills in destructively short 20-minute concert performances. By the time theyd derezzed\, their discography included two studio albums\, the soundtrack score for a documentary film about haunted houses\, plus a slew of comp tracks and singles.The band made its name by creating noise music with pop hooks. As electro continued to fizzle out and screamy dance-punk/neo-no wave enjoyed a brief spike of popularity\, kids and college radio DJs took note of PLPs eclectic and original style\, often contrasting the sound to other innovators like Liars\, Ex-Models\, and Lightning Bolt. Actual comparisons were hard to draw\, however; reviews in print and online found writers grasping for metaphors rather than listing influences. Now\, Point Line Plane is rebooting. 2026 will see the original duo resume activity after having powered down 22 years ago with a slate of Northwest gigs planned in support of their SKiN GRAFT Records labelmates Dazzling Killmenplus a special appearance at the celebrated Caterwaul Fest!https://quidquo.bandcamp.com/music

From Clock-Out Lounge

Event details

item.title: Clock-Out Lounge Presents: Legion Within w/ Black Agent\, Greg D. Forschler + DJ Drew Harlander & DJ Wives

item.title: Cynthia Brothers and Shannon Koyano Present: The Vanishing Seattle Variety Show
item.description:
Wednesday, May 20, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Clock-Out Lounge\, 4864 Beacon Ave S\, Seattle\, 98108\, United States Of America

WEDS May 20thDOORS 7:30pm / 8pm SHOW21+$15 ADV/$18 DOSIts another edition of the Vanishing Seattle Variety Show! With fabulous guests: drag legend and former Miss Gay Seattle Cookie Couture\, and writers/music journalists Martin Douglas s Cobain 50 podcast! Plus comedy from Shannon Koyano\, Vanishing Seattle trivia\, and special prizes and Seattle-themed drinks created by the citys best bartender\, Ramona! The VSVS is a one-of-a-kind event featuring all-local talent and blending stand-up comedy\, storytelling\, dazzling drag\, and more – in tribute to the wild and weird Seattle you once knew (or still do)!**Get your tix early for this sell-out show**Co-hosted by Vanishing Seattle founder Cynthia Brothers and longtime local comic Shannon Koyano. doors 7:30pm – get there early for award-winning @steviesfamous pizza!

From Clock-Out Lounge

Event details

item.title: Mad Meow Music & Loosegroove Records Present: Paul Solger 20 Years M.I.A. Record Release Party
item.description:
Saturday, May 23, 2026 at 8:30 PM

Location: Clock-Out Lounge\, 4864 Beacon Ave S\, Seattle\, 98108\, United States Of America

Mad Meow Music & Loosegroove Records Present:Paul Solger 20 Years M.I.A. Record Release PartyFeaturing performances byPaul Solger and the Subsonic Six (Dejha Colantuono\, Duff McKagen\, Sam Bligh\, Steve Ross\, Barb Ireland\, Lauren Goffin)with Thee DeceptionSat May 23Doors 8pm21+$20adv/$25doshttps://paul-solger.bandcamp.com/album/20-years-m-i-aPioneering Pacific Northwest punk rock/hardcore luminary Paul Solger will release his first-ever solo album\, 20 Years M.I.A.\, on May 8 via Loosegroove Records\, the label co-founded by Stone Gossard. The raw\, blistering eleven-track set includes standouts like the LP opener\, first single\, and video New American\, featuring Duff McKagan on lead vocals\, as well as My 3rd Dream\, Surfing In Hell\, and Mushroom Mary. Co-produced by Solger\, Gossard\, and Josh Evans\, the album further expands Loosegrooves ongoing commitment to championing Seattles underground music scene.Solger first made his mark with the band Solger\, one of the earliest hardcore groups to emerge from Seattle. The bands brief existence produced a rare self-titled 7-inch EP that has since become a sought-after collectors item among punk crate diggers. Following that project\, Solger remained active in the local scene\, performing with influential Seattle punk bands such as The Fartz and later 10 Minute Warning\, a group that fused hardcore roots with heavier\, psychedelic influences and included musicians who would later help shape the citys emerging alternative rock movement.From my perspective\, the post-punk pathways that Paul and Duff explored during the early 80s Seattle music scene are the foundation of what came to be known as grunge\, says Gossard. 20 Years M.I.A. embodies that collaborative hardcore punk attitude with slinky\, trans-harmonic nods to The Stooges and 60s psychedelia.Now that 20 Years M.I.A. is finally coming out\, I think I need to actually play these songs live to make sure its all real. The whole journey seems too good to be true. Things like this record just dont happen for me. Ive had other stuff come out\, but it was all mostly subpar sound quality and nothing I felt particularly proud of. Different story with this slab of vinyl\, concludes Solger. I hope its the first of many more until I can no longer do it due to old fricking age. Im surprised Im still here. I was probably voted one of the most likely to drop long ago\, but people change (if they want to survive) and yes there are second chances in this world. Why now? I dont know\, but its made this chapter of my life brilliant!

From Clock-Out Lounge

Event details

item.title: Steve Rylas Duo @ Perihelion Brewery
item.description:
Tuesday, May 26, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Perihelion Brewery, 2800 16th Ave South, Seattle, WA 98144

Horns of Plenty plus Vocals. This duo will be playing jazz standards from the 30’s-60’s from Nat King Cole to Frank Sinatra and Rogers + Hart to Henry Mancini. Song requests will be accepted and encouraged.

From Perihelion Brewery

Event details

item.title: Clock-Out Lounge Presents: Bob Log III with guests
item.description:
Wednesday, May 27, 2026 at 8:30 PM

Location: Clock-Out Lounge\, 4864 Beacon Ave S\, Seattle\, 98108\, United States Of America

Clock-Out Lounge Presents: Bob Log IIIwith guests Wednesday May 27th8:00 doors 21+$17adv/ $20 dos Bob Log III is a one man band slide guitar party. A perverse product of theArizona desert\, Bob Log III has been diligently travelling the globe since 1996\,showcasing his incomparable talents and developing a devoted following along theway. A whirlwind of dexterous limbs and digits\, this super star sonic showman hasto be seen to be believed.Clad in his cannonball man\, extra tight jumpsuit and signature motorcycle helmetwith telephone/microphone attached\, Bob Log III unfailingly sweats up a riverwhile kicking on a kick drum\, stomping his homemade foot cymbal and playingslide on an old archtop guitar. His endless pursuit for musical mayhem and adownright party has seen his unique talents utilized for childrens birthday parties\,obscure beer barns\, mammoth music festivals and everything in between.Yet\, beyond these mesmerizing visuals\, lies the true reason for Bob Logsinternational cult status and superhero adoration. It is quite simply the guitarplaying – finger picked lightning\, sliding up and down\, stopping when it wants to\,then starting again when it feels like it\, all in a way that makes people moveuncontrollably\, smile and reel.___Excerpts from an unpublished journal The Adventures of Bob Log III and HisFaithful Guitar\, by The Guitar

From Clock-Out Lounge

Event details

item.title: Towse @ Perihelion Brewery
item.description:
Tuesday, June 2, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Perihelion Brewery, 2800 16th Ave South, Seattle, WA 98144

Raven & Goose are a nationally touring contra duo. With fiery fiddlin' from Corwin Zekley and foot stompin' piano by Grace Fellows, they play original compositions and breathe new life into traditional tunes, all delivered with a passion that will get you up and dancing!

From Perihelion Brewery

Event details

item.title: Sarah Brunner @ Perihelion Brewery
item.description:
Tuesday, June 9, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Perihelion Brewery, 2800 16th Ave South, Seattle, WA 98144

Michigan native, now Seattle-based, Sarah Brunner is a full time musician, both solo and with her band The Hipocrats. With influences ranging from Brandi Carlile, to Sam Smith to The Lumineers, she uses rhythm guitar just as much as a vocal melody to define a song.We are excited to have Sarah at Perihelion from 7-9pm for some lovely live music.

From Perihelion Brewery

Event details

item.title: The Richard Wilson & Gina Z Trio @ Perihelion Brewer
item.description:
Tuesday, June 16, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Perihelion Brewery, 2800 16th Ave South, Seattle, WA 98144

Join us on the patio to enjoy some tunes brought to you by Richard Wilson and Gina Z!

From Perihelion Brewery

Event details

item.title: Tyler McGinnis @ Perihelion Brewery
item.description:
Tuesday, June 23, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Perihelion Brewery, 2800 16th Ave South, Seattle, WA 98144

Born and raised in Los Angeles, CA It was not until after graduating high school and moving to Fremont, NE, to attend Midland University on scholarship for football that Tyler began to pursue his passion for music with vigor. After graduating, he relocated to Seattle, WA in the summer of 2017, where he currently resides and has been making impressive leaps and bounds in his songwriting, performing, and overall musical identity during his time in the PNW. His creative spin on past and present experiences breeds songs that lyrically offer a sensationalized window into his life. Tyler boasts powerful vocal performances that mix rich styles of Americana and Alternative Country music with Southern Rock and a fresh twist of soulful melodies. His music will have you singing along to a good time drinking song, reminiscing about long lost love and the regretful or questionable choices of your past, then leave you feeling uplifted, refreshed, and in an all around good mood.

From Perihelion Brewery

Event details

item.title: John Pronto @ Perihelion Brewery
item.description:
Tuesday, July 7, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Perihelion Brewery, 2800 16th Ave South, Seattle, WA 98144

John Pronto blends the soul of folk, the grit of blues, and the openness of Americana into a sound that feels both timeless and deeply personal. His music captures the essence of life’s struggles and triumphs, exploring love, heartache, and redemption with unfiltered honesty. With a voice that carries both warmth and raw emotion, Pronto draws from the storytelling traditions of American roots music. Join us for this performance in the outdoor patio space!

From Perihelion Brewery

Event details

item.title: Chase Rabideau @ Perihelion Brewery
item.description:
Tuesday, July 14, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Perihelion Brewery, 2800 16th Ave South, Seattle, WA 98144

A professional guitarist and singer of many musical backgrounds, Chase Rabideau is a crowd-centered entertainer with a background in many popular genres. Along with folk/rock centric original music that can be found online, Chase plays over 400 covers in a variety of genres such as rock ‘n roll (50’s, 60’s, 70’s, +more), classic country, folk, R&B, jazz, blues, folk/pub songs from Ireland, (seasonal) Christmas music, and crowd-favorite popular music.

From Perihelion Brewery

Event details

item.title: Johnny & Reg @ Perihelion Brewery
item.description:
Tuesday, July 21, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Perihelion Brewery, 2800 16th Ave South, Seattle, WA 98144

Johnny & Reg grew from late-night jam sessions and a shared love of funky, soulful music. Their sound drifts through blue notes and grooves, equal parts raw and refined. It carries the dust of back roads and the glow of late-night campfires — acoustic wanderers moving from town to town with a suitcase of blues, jazz-tinged melodies, and stories gathered along the way. The sound leans into raw wood and warm strings, equal parts grit and grace, always shaped by the places they pass through. Eclectic, earthy, and effortlessly heartfelt.With tight harmonies, weathered rhythms, and a laid-back charm, they will bring a rich, rootsy energy to Perihelion’s outdoor Patio!

From Perihelion Brewery

Event details

item.title: Bryan John Appleby @ Perihelion Brewery
item.description:
Tuesday, July 28, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Perihelion Brewery, 2800 16th Ave South, Seattle, WA 98144

Bryan John Appleby is a singer/songwriter and multi-instrumentalist based in Seattle. His folk-centric body of work draws elements from mid-century pop, wall-of-sound, psychodelia, tropicália, and classic cinema.  Appleby’s most recent effort, Underwater Easy Breathing (Plume Records) exemplifies a distinct production palette and fantastical tendencies. Lush, coastal, synth-laced; the album is a natural next step in his wandering, often densely layered folk repertoire.Join us on the patio to enjoy this wonderful performace!

From Perihelion Brewery

Event details

item.title: Sarah Brunner @ Perihelion Brewery
item.description:
Tuesday, August 18, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Perihelion Brewery, 2800 16th Ave South, Seattle, WA 98144

Michigan native, now Seattle-based, Sarah Brunner is a full time musician, both solo and with her band The Hipocrats. With influences ranging from Brandi Carlile, to Sam Smith to The Lumineers, she uses rhythm guitar just as much as a vocal melody to define a song.We are excited to have Sarah at Perihelion from 7-9pm for some lovely live music.

item.description:
Tuesday, August 25, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Perihelion Brewery, 2800 16th Ave South, Seattle, WA 98144

Born and raised in Los Angeles, CA It was not until after graduating high school and moving to Fremont, NE, to attend Midland University on scholarship for football that Tyler began to pursue his passion for music with vigor. After graduating, he relocated to Seattle, WA in the summer of 2017, where he currently resides and has been making impressive leaps and bounds in his songwriting, performing, and overall musical identity during his time in the PNW. His creative spin on past and present experiences breeds songs that lyrically offer a sensationalized window into his life. Tyler boasts powerful vocal performances that mix rich styles of Americana and Alternative Country music with Southern Rock and a fresh twist of soulful melodies. His music will have you singing along to a good time drinking song, reminiscing about long lost love and the regretful or questionable choices of your past, then leave you feeling uplifted, refreshed, and in an all around good mood.

From Perihelion Brewery

item.title: Mortgage Lifters @ Perihelion Brewery
item.description:
Tuesday, September 22, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Perihelion Brewery, 2800 16th Ave S, Seattle

Seattle and Vashon Island based band playing original and classic swing pop songs. Kim Thal, Robert Hinrix, Johnny Calcagno, and Tony Mates. Also known in some circles as Radiator Charlie's Mortgage Lifters. Tunes of the Golden Era.

From Perihelion Brewery
